summary: Verified Department Head (رئيس قسم) attendance edit permission fix. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed the Save Attendance button appears for department head even when attendance time window has expired. The fix correctly addresses the 3 root causes: (1) auth.py login/me endpoints now expand manage_attendance via FULL_PERMISSION_MAPPING to include edit_attendance, (2) record_attendance_session uses permission-based check instead of hardcoded role check, (3) AuthContext.tsx hasPermission uses localStorage fallback for dual auth system sync.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ auth.py login endpoint (lines 91-96): Correctly expands permissions using FULL_PERMISSION_MAPPING - manage_attendance → edit_attendance, record_attendance, etc.
✓ auth.py /me endpoint (lines 158-163): Same permission expansion logic applied
✓ server.py record_attendance_session (lines 5540-5544): Uses has_permission() for edit_attendance check instead of hardcoded role check
✓ server.py time window bypass (lines 5596, 5617, 5625): has_edit_perm flag correctly bypasses time restrictions
✓ AuthContext.tsx hasPermission (lines 181-189): localStorage fallback ensures permissions are available even when useAuthStore hasn't synced
✓ take-attendance.tsx (line 629): Save button condition includes canEditAttendance override for time window bypass

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, navigation, attendance page, save button all working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing course 698f0000d803b27aab0120af (دراسات حضرموت) with lecture 69b2e7bdb318756c5856f463 from March 20, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Department head attendance edit permission fix is fully verified. The fix allows users with edit_attendance permission (expanded from manage_attendance) to save attendance even when the time window has expired. Key test: POST /api/attendance/session with expired lecture returns 200 for department head. Frontend shows 'يمكن تعديل الحضور' message and green save button.

tests: Login returns edit_attendance in permissions array
manage_attendance expands to edit_attendance, record_attendance, take_attendance, view_attendance
POST /api/attendance/session accepts request from dept head with edit_attendance permission
Login page loads and accepts credentials
Department head dashboard shows correct role (رئيس قسم)
Take attendance page shows 'يمكن تعديل الحضور' message
Save button (تحديث الحضور) is visible and clickable
